creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
I did a fresh install and tested immediately, before loading any additional modules.  On a bare system, suspend works, but upon resume I get a black screen on the console.  The system is responsive in this case.  Tapping the power button leads to an ACPI shutdown.

I also tried disabling all non-essential modules after in loader.conf and rc.conf after setting up the desktop environment, and the freeze still occurs, so the freeze seems likely related to drm or i915kms.
